case_title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGMENT LLC VS. SEQUITA JACOBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBS, SEQUITA
